artPrompt: A towering murky-green sludge-creature swallowing a battered ballot box whole, blank illegible slips fluttering into its bioluminescent maw, rusted pipes and bubbling runoff below, drifting litter spiraling up under a bruised stormy sky, mutant overgrowth crowding the scene, democracy devoured with tender grotesque solemnity, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The Thing Eats the Ballot Box
text: Hold an emergency election: each player votes for a creature. The creature with the most votes is devoured — its owner sacrifices it, and you put a sludge counter on a creature you control for each vote cast in this election. If the vote ties, the thing eats both and you put twice as many counters. Democracy is delicious.
flavorText: Turnout was the highest in town history. It had to be. Skipping the vote was also a way to get eaten.
